message:
test(disk_pressure): add ~30 unit tests covering EWMA, PID, tiers, and monitor lifecycle

Dramatically increases test coverage for the disk pressure monitoring
subsystem:

- EWMA edge cases: alpha=0 (no update), alpha=1 (instant), clamping,
  convergence behavior
- PID controller: zero error, P-only response, I-accumulation,
  D-response, integral clamping, inverted bounds, zero dt handling
- Tier classification: boundary conditions at each threshold
- df parser: edge cases in output parsing
- Monitor lifecycle: initial state, disabled mode, sample consistency,
  update counting, snapshot numerics, timestamp accuracy, serde
  roundtrip, Display trait formatting

Minor formatting adjustments in PidController::update() and
DiskPressureMonitor::snapshot(). Proptest disk_pressure strategies
updated with formatting changes only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
